title: Korean Editorial Fashion Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Korean Editorial Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: adult East Asian fashion model in ivory knit cardigan and long satin skirt, calm emotional gaze. Scene / Context: minimal Seoul studio apartment, soft daylight, vertical 2:3 fashion editorial portrait. Source Recipe Translation: Korean editorial fashion portrait. Preserve these source mechanics: realistic Korean fashion portrait, elegant refined adult model, polished editorial look, soft skin texture. Concrete social variant uses adult East Asian fashion model in ivory knit cardigan and long satin skirt, calm emotional gaze in minimal Seoul studio apartment, soft daylight, vertical 2:3 fashion editorial portrait. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: realistic Korean fashion portrait, elegant refined adult model, polished editorial look, soft skin texture; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: no visible text; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
